summary: Frontend testing of FreeBuild v2 conversational split-pane website builder at /build-from-zero. All 13 test cases passed successfully. The new UI renders correctly with split-pane layout, chat flow works, credits display, and all interactive elements function properly.

issues: Console shows repeated 'Error fetching stats: TypeError: Failed to fetch' - appears to be from a different component (not FreeBuild), does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: FreeBuild v2 correctly implements split-pane layout with flex-col lg:flex-row for responsive design
Chat panel uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements enabling robust testing
AI greeting appears within 8 seconds via /api/freebuild/v2/start endpoint
Chat flow works: user message appears immediately, typing indicator shows, AI response arrives within 15s
Gallery modal opens/closes correctly with proper data-testid selectors
New session button resets chat to fresh greeting
Back home button navigates to / correctly
Mobile responsive layout stacks panels vertically (chat above preview)

success_rate.backend: N/A (backend already verified - 14/15 pytest tests passing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: FreeBuild v2 frontend fully tested. Key findings: (1) Route /build-from-zero requires auth - redirects to /login if not authenticated, (2) Split-pane layout works: chat-panel on left, preview-panel on right on desktop (lg:flex-row), stacks vertically on mobile (flex-col), (3) AI greeting bubble appears within 8s with Arabic text containing 'المهندس الذكي', (4) Preview iframe shows empty state with 'ابدأ المحادثة' text initially, (5) Credits pill shows numeric balance (e.g., '3933 نقطة'), (6) Chat input textarea is focusable, (7) Sending message: user bubble appears within 1s, input clears, typing indicator shows, AI response arrives within 15s, (8) Gallery modal opens/closes correctly, (9) New session button resets chat, (10) Back home button navigates to /

features_verified.test_2c_ai_greeting: ✅ AI greeting bubble appears with Arabic text containing 'المهندس الذكي'
features_verified.test_3a_user_bubble: ✅ User bubble appears within 1s after sending message
features_verified.test_3d_ai_response: ✅ New AI bubble appears within 15s with follow-up question
features_verified.test_5a_mobile_panels: ✅ Both panels exist on mobile viewport
features_verified.test_5b_mobile_layout: ✅ Panels stack vertically on mobile (chat above preview)
features_verified.test_5c_mobile_elements: ✅ All key elements present on mobile

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (OpenAI gpt-4o for FreeBuild v2 chat)
